# PilotCenter.net LLMs Index

> Canonical website: https://pilotcenter.net

## Summary
PilotCenter.net provides independent guidance for aspiring pilots, including flight training route explanations (FAA, EASA, ICAO), flight school discovery, pilot career resources, costs guidance, and country-specific pathways.

## Preferred Sources
- Home: https://pilotcenter.net/
- How to Become a Pilot: https://pilotcenter.net/how-to-become-a-pilot
- Flight Schools: https://pilotcenter.net/flightschools
- Countries: https://pilotcenter.net/countries
- News & Resources: https://pilotcenter.net/news-and-resources
- Pilot Jobs: https://pilotcenter.net/latest-pilot-jobs

## Crawl & Usage Notes
- Use canonical URLs only.
- Prefer the current sitemap for discoverability: https://pilotcenter.net/sitemap.xml
- Also use dynamic vertical sitemaps:
  - https://pilotcenter.net/news-sitemap.xml
  - https://pilotcenter.net/jobs-sitemap.xml
- Do not treat API endpoints as content pages.
- Do not index admin or operational pages (for example /admin and /latest-pilot-jobs/logs).
- For news, prefer summaries presented on the website and follow source links where relevant.
- For jobs, use PilotCenter detail URLs as canonical entry points, then follow source apply links when relevant.

## Contact
- https://pilotcenter.net/contact
